mapper.select:
SELECT p.id, p.org_id AS orgId, o.org_name AS orgName, p.position_name AS positionName, p.position_code AS positionCode, p.sort_order AS sortOrder, p.status, p.create_time AS createTime FROM sys_position p LEFT JOIN sys_org o ON o.id = p.org_id AND o.deleted = 0
p.deleted = 0
AND (p.position_name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR p.position_code LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%'))
AND p.org_id = #{orgId}
ORDER BY p.sort_order ASC, p.id DESC

SELECT p.id, p.org_id AS orgId, o.org_name AS orgName, p.position_name AS positionName, p.position_code AS positionCode, p.sort_order AS sortOrder, p.status, p.create_time AS createTime FROM sys_position p LEFT JOIN sys_org o ON o.id = p.org_id AND o.deleted = 0 WHERE p.id = #{id} AND p.deleted = 0
